title: Sightlines: reconstruct a single incident or site in time and space, consent first
description: The first tool of the Parallax suite, a counter-forensic toolkit for art history and the archive. Gathers dated, hashed sources; places each photograph's subject and camera vantage on a map; crosses the sightlines to resect a location; orders everything on a linked timeline; states findings tethered to their sources; and publishes a consent-cleared interactive investigation through a single boundary. Establishes the shared core the suite reuses. Source-available and published for verifiability, not as a product to adopt. Source code is licensed under the PolyForm Noncommercial License 1.0.0; the non-code assets under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.
